title: Wynncraft for Lunar Client
description: Tailor-made list of popular mods to enhance your gameplay experience while playing Wynncraft on Lunar Client.
body:
## Wynncraft for Lunar Client **Wynncraft for Lunar Client** is a tailor-made list of popular mods to enhance your gameplay experience while playing Wynncraft on Lunar Client. These mods are validated to work with Lunar Client. _Note: To experience **Wynncraft** at its best, we highly recommend downloading [**Lunar Client**](https://lunarclient.com/download). While any modpack loader can be used, [**Lunar Client**](https://lunarclient.com/download) offers superior performance and features._ ## Modpack Content * **Cloth Config API**: Configuration library for Minecraft Mods. * **Krypton**: Optimizes in the Minecraft network stack. Reduces CPU and memory usage. * **Mod Menu**: Adds a mod menu to view an in-game list of all the mods you have installed. * **More Culling**: Prevents the rendering of things you cannot see to improve performance. * **Nvidium**: Optimizations for Minecraft users who have a NVIDIA GPU. * **Reese's Sodium Options**: Replaces Sodium's option screen to improve user experience. * **ShowMeMyDPS!**: A wynncraft mod that to display total damage within a specific period of time. * **Sodium Extra**: Adds features found in Optifine to Sodium, like particle and animation settings. * **Wynncraft Spell Caster**: Spell casting mod for Wynncraft. * **Wynntils**: Seeks to enhance the gameplay experience of Wynncraft with a variety of features. * **Fuy**: Utility mod for Wynncraft, fixes reveal nicknames, stack dupe messages, and more. * **Bobby**: Allows for your render distance to be greater than the server's view-distance. ## FAQ
What is Wynncraft and how do I play it? **Wynncraft** is an open world MMORPG, full of adventures, unique experiences, and places to explore. From diverse landscapes, cities, and villages to mysterioues forest and spooky dungeons. Engage in a trilling adventure as you explore around to challenge your skills and complete quest solo or with team up with friends. Ready to explore? Join using Wynncraft's server IP: [wynncraft.com](https://wynncraft.com/)
How do I install the Wynncraft Modpack on Lunar Client?
Here are the five easy steps you need to take!
### Step 1: Download Lunar Client [![Lunar Client Download Grid](https://cmsassets.lunarclientcdn.com/cdn-cgi/image/quality=85,format=auto/assets/edcac7cc5f-lunar-client-download-grid.png)](https://www.lunarclient.com/download) ### Step 2: Select "Versions" on the Lunar Client Launcher [![Lunar Client Launcher](https://cmsassets.lunarclientcdn.com/cdn-cgi/image/quality=85,format=auto/assets/bbe073a641-launcher-versions-tab.png)](https://www.lunarclient.com/news/mod-loading-on-lunar-client) ### Step 3: Click "Modpacks" on the top of the page [![Lunar Client Modpacks](https://cmsassets.lunarclientcdn.com/cdn-cgi/image/quality=85,format=auto/assets/13915e6116-lunarclient-modpacks-page.png)](https://www.lunarclient.com/news/mod-loading-on-lunar-client) ### Step 4: Install your modpack of choosing, in this case the **Wynncraft** Modpack for Lunar Client. [![Lunar Client Modpack Installer](https://cmsassets.lunarclientcdn.com/cdn-cgi/image/quality=85,format=auto/assets/b880040165-launcher-install-play.png)](https://www.lunarclient.com/news/mod-loading-on-lunar-client) ### Step 5: Click "Launch Game" after the install is complete! [![Lunar Client Launch Button](https://cmsassets.lunarclientcdn.com/cdn-cgi/image/quality=85,format=auto/assets/42725ba855-launcher-mods-page.png)](https://www.lunarclient.com/news/mod-loading-on-lunar-client)

Be a part of our growing community, join our [Discord](https://lunarclient.com/discord) for the latest news and updates!
